name: Chocolate Cheesecake (with or Without Amaretto)
recipeIngredient: Mix and pat into 10-inch springform pan, bottom and sides.
32 oz CREAM CHEESE, remove from wrappers and soften in microwave for 2 minutes.
5 JUMBO EGGS, shelled and warmed in micro for 25 seconds.
recipeInstructions:
CRUST
1. Crush chocolate wafers and mix with sugar, cinnamon, and melted butter.
2. Press mixture into prepared springform pan, covering the bottom and sides.
CAKE
1. Remove cream cheese from wrappers and soften in microwave for 2 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together sugar, melted chocolate chips, cornstarch, and heavy cream until smooth.
3. Add warmed eggs one at a time, stirring constantly after each addition.
4. Stir in vanilla extract or amaretto.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust and spread evenly.
6. Bake in preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour or until set.
7. Turn off heat and let cool to room temperature before refrigerating.
